query:
ALTER TABLE load_quotations 
ADD COLUMN manualVerdict VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL AFTER status,
ADD COLUMN verdictNotes TEXT DEFAULT NULL AFTER manualVerdict,
ADD COLUMN verdictOverriddenBy INT DEFAULT NULL AFTER verdictNotes,
ADD COLUMN verdictOverriddenAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NULL AFTER verdictOverriddenBy;
